underlying_goal: Plan and figure out how to capture raw SIA alarm panel byte data for building a test dataset before a hands-on session with their boss
friction_detail: Atlassian MCP auth initially failed requiring re-auth, and Claude initially suggested using their existing processor/TCP server when user wanted something simpler and more standalone.
brief_summary: User wanted to pull a Jira ticket and discuss how to capture raw alarm panel data for testing; they got context on options (tcpdump, custom Go script) and a plan to implement it the next day.
